tooltip.radweaponry.shift: 按住 [SHIFT] 查看更多信息
tooltip.radweaponry.hummingbirdfan.name: [Gust]
tooltip.radweaponry.hummingbirdfan.desc: • 攻击 inflict 劲风 for %s 秒, stacking up to 劲风%s • 劲风 lifts the target periodically. • 暴击 apply %s stacks ‣ 右键 to launch nearby mobs with 劲风 upwards and away, dealing %s 魔法 伤害 per stack and applying the Chromatic 效果 (冷却: %ss) ‣ Sneak 右键 to launch yourself (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.hummingbirdfan.desc2: • Apply an on-hit 效果 based on color • 蓝色: 缓慢%s for %ss • 橙色: 虚弱%s for %ss • 粉色: 漂浮 for %ss • 紫色: 中毒%s for %ss • 红色: Ignite for %ss • 雪: 缓慢%s for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.name: [Hydra Poison]
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.desc: • 暴击 inflict 中毒 for %s 秒, stacking up to 中毒%s (max %ss total) • 攻击 deal %s more 伤害 per stack of 中毒 on target
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.desc2: • Grants immunity to 中毒 • 中毒 applied to you is converted to Regeneration
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.desc3: • 右键 to toss a Splash 药水 of 中毒 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.halbird.name: [Clucky Strike]
tooltip.radweaponry.halbird.desc: • %s 概率 to deal %sx 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.halbird.desc2: • Deals %sx 伤害 to 飞行生物
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.name: [Divine Blessing]
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.desc: • Grants Absorption%s to allies and Absorption%s to you when thrown at them
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.desc2: • Thrown spear is not consumed, pierces infinitely, and applies Glowing
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.desc3: • Deal %sx 伤害 to Undead; compatible with Smite
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.name: [Lethal Incision]
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.desc: • 右键 to hurl a venom-coated 刀刃, inflicting 中毒%s and creating a lingering 中毒%s 云团 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.desc3: • Deals %sx 伤害 to poisoned enemies
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.desc4: • Combine with a 中毒 药水 in an Anvil to temporarily amplify Way of the 蜘蛛
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.demon: 恶魔 核心 Infusion: 中毒 %s (%s Charges)
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.name: [Life Siphon]
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc.vanill: • Absorbs life from mobs you kill, storing up to %s 精华, which give %s 最大生命值 each • Mending doubles capacity
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc.radenc: • Absorbs life from mobs you kill, storing up to %s 精华 which give %s 最大生命值 each • Mending doubles capacity • Life Leech gives a %s 概率 per level for an additional charge
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc2: • Press [__TOK0__] to consume 储存精华, restoring health and granting Regeneration and Saturation
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc3: • If you would die with full 精华, consume all charges to survive instead (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.name: [Moon Blade]
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc: • 攻击 deal 魔法 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc2: • After %s hits, attack 附近所有生物 and gain 力量%s and Speed%s (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc3.vanil: • 夜晚 grants %sx 治疗提升 and Speed%s
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc3.ars: • 夜晚 grants %sx 治疗提升 and 法力恢复%s
tooltip.radweaponry.cinderstorm.name: [Needle Fury]
tooltip.radweaponry.cinderstorm.desc: • Instantly shoots arrows (冷却: %ss, affected by Quick Charge)
tooltip.radweaponry.cinderstorm.desc2: • Shoots flaming arrows that inflict 缓慢%s for %s 秒 and explode in a 小型 area
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.name: [Extending]
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.desc: • Each consecutive attack temporarily extends the pole, increasing Attack Reach • Sneak 右键 or deselect to retract
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.desc2: • Gains Attack Speed as it extends
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.desc3: • High durability and %s 概率 to ignore durability loss
tooltip.radweaponry.pitcher_canteen.name: [Potion Storage]
tooltip.radweaponry.pitcher_canteen.desc: • Place similar potions into this to store the effects and drink them later
• Pour into a filled cauldron to empty
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.name: [Exploit Weakness]
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.desc: • Increases 伤害 dealt to mobs based on how many times you've killed them
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.desc2: • Reduces 伤害 taken from mobs based on how many times you've killed them
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.desc3: • Grants a 概率 for increased Looting for mobs based on how many times you've killed them
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.attac: +%s 造成伤害 to %s (%s 击杀)
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.hurt_: -%s 受到伤害 from %s (%s 击杀)
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.looti: %s Looting bonus 概率 对 %s (%s 击杀)
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.name: [Rekindling]
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc.1: • Killing ignited mobs grants up to %s charges; 火焰 Protection increases the max capacity by %s per level
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc.3: • %s charges: Gain 火焰 抗性
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc.4: • %s charges: You are constantly on 火焰
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc2: • Press [__TOK0__] with max charges to expend all charges, blasting nearby enemies with a burst of 火焰 that deals %s 伤害 per charge (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc3: • Every %ss: blasts up to %s nearby mobs for %s 伤害; Flame increases max targets by %s and 伤害 by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.1: • Increases 伤害 to burning targets by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.2: • 火焰 Aspect increases this bonus by %s per level
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.3: • While on 火焰, this bonus is multiplied by %sx
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.ars: • Also increases 火焰 spell 伤害 by %sx
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.name: [Piercing]
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc.1: • Deals %s bonus 伤害 per point of 护甲 the target has
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc.2: • Deals %s bonus 伤害 per point of 护甲 Toughness the target has
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc2.1: • If offhand is empty, %s 伤害, %s attack speed
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc2.2: • If offhand is not empty, %s 伤害, %s attack speed
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc3: • During day, gain 力量%s and 火焰 抗性
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc4: • During night, gain Speed%s and Night Vision
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.name: [Tempo Release]
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.1: • Fires at full speed when minimum charge is reached
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.2: • Plays a note on release corresponding to how long it was drawn
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.3: • Low notes deal %sx 伤害, mid notes deal %sx 伤害, high notes deal %sx 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.4: • Quick Charge decreases time needed to reach higher notes
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc2: • Combine with tunable note block sound modifiers in an Anvil to change the instrument played
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.1: • Stores the last 3 notes played to form a melody, times out in %s 秒
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.2: • Completing a melody replays the sequence and triggers an 效果
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.3: ♫ Crescendo (LMH): 力量%s & Haste%s to party for %s 秒 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.4: ♫ Decrescendo (HML): 缓慢%s & 虚弱%s to nearby mobs (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.5: ♫ Harmony (MLH): Heals party for %s of their 最大生命值 and grants Regeneration%s for %s 秒 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.6: ♫ Discordance (MHL): Disorient & knockback nearby mobs for %s 秒 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.7: ♫ Staccato (HLM): Fires a %s round burst (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.8: ♫ Legato (LML): Grants 抗性%s to party for %s 秒 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.9: ♫ Cadence (HHL): Deals %s 魔法 伤害 to nearby mobs in %s pulses (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.1: ♫ Resonance (MHM): Repeats last melody and empowers it (冷却 x%s)
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.name: [Bloodletting]
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc: • Consumes 2% of health to 火焰 empowered blood arrows
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc2: • Overcharging consumes extra health to increase arrow base 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc3.1: • Arrows refund 50% of their cost on hit, 100% on kill
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc3.2: • Arrows deal 1% of targets health as bonus 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc3.3: • Arrows inflict 虚弱 and Nausea
tooltip.radweaponry.lightning_hammer.des: • 暴击 apply 缓慢%s for %s 秒
• 暴击 cause a lightning strike to occur after %ss, dealing %s of the attack's 伤害 (冷却: %ss)
• During a thunderstorm, this attack strikes an additional time
• After killing a 生物, deal %s of its 最大生命值 as 伤害 to nearby mobs after %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.name: [Gunblade]
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.1: • Can be used to automatically shoot hitscan bullets
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.2: • Possesses a capacity of %s energy bullets
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.3: • After using all ammo, reloads for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.4: • Reloads automatically after not firing for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc2.1: • Reduced movement speed penalty while using
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc2.2: • Melee attacks grant Speed%s and Jump Boost%s for %s 秒
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc2.3: • Ranged attacks grant 力量%s and Haste%s for %s 秒
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc3.3: • Channeling increases ranged attack speed by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc3.5: • Quick Charge decreases auto-reload delay by %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.stats.1: Ammo: %s/%s | 伤害: %s | 火焰 Rate: %ss | Range: %s
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.name: [Phasing]
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc.1: • Press [__TOK0__] to phase through the void, granting increased mobility and decreased attack power
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc.2: • Grants 虚弱 X, Invisibility, 抗性 V, Jump Boost V, and Speed III for %s 秒 (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc2.1: • Locking eyes with a target grants you Blindness, Speed%s, and 力量%s for %ss, and gives the target Glowing and 缓慢%s (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc2.2: • Barehanded attacks deal %sx 伤害 to target during Abyssal Gaze
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc3: • When falling into the void, gain Elytra Flight and Regeneration X
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.name: [Resolve's Edge]
• Defeating a boss with this weapon increases its 伤害
• Completing quests increases this swords 伤害
• Completing chapters increases this swords 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.desc2: • Sneak 右键 to create a temporary marker at the target location you can teleport back to within %s (冷却: %s)
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.desc3: • %s 概率 for %sx experience drops when defeating mobs
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.desc4: • Automatically adds waypoints to visited structures
tooltip.radweaponry.viper_amulet.name: [Poison Accelerant]
tooltip.radweaponry.viper_amulet.desc: • Increases 中毒 伤害 nearby mobs receive
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Brute's Rebuke]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • After blocking a melee attack, your next attack within %ss deals %sx 伤害
• If the item is loved by piglins or repairs with 金, deals an additional %sx 伤害
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Deflector]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • Blocking a projectile redirects it to where you are looking
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Battle Bracer]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • No movement speed penalty while blocking
• Any blocked attack 幽火 breach the 盾牌, putting it on 冷却
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Golden Bastion]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • Increases 护甲 by %s when worn
• Increases 护甲 toughness by %s when worn
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.name: [Momentum Strike]
• Attacking grants up to %s momentum stacks, which increase Attack Speed by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.desc2: • Holding use assumes a defensive stance, deflecting projectiles and blocking attacks
• Reduced movement speed penalty while defending
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.desc3: • Releasing use while aiming at an entity triggers a swift dash attack (冷却: %ss)
• You are immune to 伤害 for %ss after activating
• Deals 伤害 equal to %s 剑 strikes
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.desc4: • Quick Charge increases maximum Momentum stacks by %s
• Multishot increases Unending Hatred strike count by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.name: [Devouring]
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc.1: • Blocking an attack causes the 盾牌 to bite the attacker, dealing 伤害 that scales with your health, 护甲, and 护甲 toughness (冷却: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc.2: • Defeating a 生物 with this attack grants you Saturation for 2s and 力量%s for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc2.1: • Each in-game day the 盾牌 craves a new 生物
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc2.2: • Devouring desired mobs grants Saturation for 5s, Regeneration%s and 抗性%s for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc2.3: • Feeding the 盾牌 desired mobs permanently strengthens it
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc3.1: • If the 盾牌 has been fed today, Devouring attacks 幽火 deal %sx 伤害
• If the 盾牌 has been fed today, Devouring attacks 幽火 deal %sx 伤害, Gluttony increases this bonus
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc3.2: • Can be repaired by feeding it food items by 右键ing an item onto it
• Can be repaired by feeding it food items by 右键ing an item onto it, Curse of Appetite increases repair amount
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc4.1: • Increases 最大生命值 %s when held
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc4.2: • Increases 护甲 by %s and 护甲 toughness by %s when held, increased with Spice of Life
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc4.3: • You are unable to move while blocking
